_meta.description: Intent-aware offer registry. All offers disabled by default — set enabled:true to activate.

card.headline: Is pet insurance worth it for your dog?
card.body: Vet bills can reach $1,000–$5,000 unexpectedly. Pet insurance is worth considering for breeds with known health risks.
card.disclosure: This is editorial guidance, not a paid placement.

card.headline: Curious about your dog's breed mix?
card.body: DNA tests can reveal ancestry, health predispositions, and breed-specific traits from a simple cheek swab.
card.disclosure: Affiliate links may appear on linked pages.

card.headline: Get vet advice without the wait
card.body: Online vet consultations let you ask licensed vets questions about symptoms, medications, and preventive care — often same day.
card.disclosure: Affiliate links may appear on linked pages.

card.headline: Fresh dog food — is it right for your breed?
card.body: Fresh and gently cooked dog food has grown in popularity. It may suit dogs with sensitive digestion or picky eating habits.
card.disclosure: Affiliate links may appear on linked pages.
